fall-larb.name: Fall Larb

ingredients.prep: bottom third only,tough outer layers removed, thinly sliced
peeled, seeds removed, cut into 1" pieces

instructions: Toast rice, lemongrass, galangal, and lime leaves in a dry medium skillet, stirring occasionally, over medium heat until about 80 percent of rice is golden brown, 5–7 minutes. Transfer to a plate; let cool.
Place rice mixture in a blender and pulse until texture is sandy but not too fine (a little texture is good). Set aside.

Smash garlic and a small pinch of salt to a coarse paste with a mortar and pestle. Add chiles and lightly smash (the finer you pound the chiles, the spicier the dressing will be). Mix in lime juice, fish sauce, sugar, and 1 Tbsp. water. (Or, finely chop garlic and salt, then chiles, on a cutting board and smash with the side of a chef’s knife. Mix in a bowl with remaining ingredients.)
Preheat oven to 400°. Toss squash, carrots, and oil on a rimmed baking sheet to coat; season with salt. Roast, tossing halfway through, until golden brown around edges, 20–25 minutes.
Transfer vegetables to a large bowl. Pour dressing over and sprinkle reserved rice powder on top; toss to coat. Add scallions, cilantro, and mint and toss again to combine.

fasting-bun-without-butter-argiro.name: Fasting Bun Without Butter
instructions: We prepare the leader first.
Dissolve the yeast in a large bowl with some lukewarm water (35oC).
Add the sugar and flower and mix the Porridge.
Cover the bowl and allow the dough to rise for 20 minutes.

fenugreek-meatballs-argiro.name: Fenugreek Meatballs
instructions: Wash the fresh Tender fennel.
Dry the fennel leaves very well on abstract paper.
Fine chop the fennel and its very Tender steps in a bowl.
We keep the thinks of the fennel to flavor other foods.
Add the grated dry onion with its zooms.
Fine chop the fresh versions with their green leaves in the encounterballs.
Salt the natives and rub them with the hands to share and lower animation.
Sprinkle with the flour that inflates itself and pour some water until we have a thinks source.
Heat the olive oil in a pan.
With a spoon, take seedfuls of the mixture and pour it into the hot oil.
From the seed we take the marathon metballs were also called "putalites" or marathon coupalites.
Dip the seed into the oil or hot water, so that the meatballs can easily fall into the pan.
Each time you dip the spoon in the hot water gently shake the exces water. We're just doing it so the matches can slip out of the sponge.
In medium heat, fry the encounterballs for 2 minutes to brown.
We're turning them over to brown on both sides.
We put them on absorbent paper to draw.
In the same way we fry all matches with fennel.

fig-salad-with-goats-milk-yogurt-and-pep.name: Fig Salad With Goat's Milk Yogurt And Pepper Cress
instructions: Whisk together first 5 ingredients in medium bowl. Season with salt and reserve.
Sprinkle figs with fleur de sel; set in center of plate. Drizzle dressing on figs; scatter pepper cress and mint over. Season with olive oil and Indonesian pepper.
* Also known as Balinese long pepper; available at specialty foods stores, Middle Eastern markets, and from zingermans.com.

fish-souffle-in-tray-teleculinaria.name: Fish Soufflé In Tray
instructions: Put on a tray of dishes with butter. Cook the fish in salted water, then drain it and reserve. Peel and pinch the onion and garlic teeth.

Light a pot with the olive oil, add the onion and garlic teeth and let it stir from time to time. Then add the flour, stirring always and the milk in yarn. Let cooking stir once in a while until it thickens.

Separate the egg whites. In a separate bowl beat the yolks and add to the previous yarn preparation, always stirring. Remove from the fire, add the shredded fish, chopped parsley and nutmeg. Retrieve the seasonings and wrap. Finally beat the clears in castle and gently mix in the preparation. Drop to the tray and take to the preheated oven at 200°C about 30 minutes. Remove and serve your taste.

five-cheese-pizza-cupcakes.name: Five-cheese Pizza Cupcakes
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Preheat the oven to 220 degrees C.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Use the oil to lightly grease the cups of two 12-cup muffin tins.'}

{'step': '3', 'description': 'Take pizza dough and put enough in each cup to cover the bottom and 1/3 to 1/2 up the sides. Sprinkle garlic salt over top, then spoon 1 tablespoon sauce onto each crust.'}

{'step': '4', 'description': 'Layer toppings on the sauce: pepperoni, bell pepper, and onion. Add about 1 tablespoon Mexican cheese to each and continue layering toppings: salami, more bell pepper, and more pepperoni. Add a layer of mozzarella cheese and Cheddar cheese.'}
{'step': '5', 'description': 'Continue layering toppings until muffin cups are slightly overfull; the toppings should not overflow during cooking, they will settle into the tin.'}
{'step': '6', 'description': 'Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes.'}
{'step': '7', 'description': 'Remove from the oven and cool in the tins for 2 minutes before serving.'}

flatbread-pastry-with-plenty-of-ingredie.name: Flatbread Pastry With Plenty Of Ingredients

ingredients.item: 1 tea cup grated fresh cheese Home

instructions: 1. Mix grated cheeses in a bowl for the inner mortar.
2. Softeners are divided into a kitchen countertop or two.
3. Two slices of rust in the middle of each Yufka and broadcast from cheeses that you mix.
4. Fold the Yufka in the dörde to achieve square.
5. Repeat the same process until all material is finished.
6. Pour the olive oil on the bottoms of the Yufka and fry in a nonstick surface pan.
7. Serve hot.

florentine-eggs.name: Florentine Eggs

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Beat eggs, milk, and a pinch of salt together in a bowl.

Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat; cook and stir onion and garlic until onion is softened, 5 to 10 minutes. Add mushrooms, spinach, and cherry tomatoes; cook and stir until spinach is wilted, 3 to 5 minutes.

Pour egg mixture over vegetable mixture and cook until eggs are still soft and halfway cooked, 2 to 3 minutes. Add mozzarella cheese and Parmesan cheese to egg mixture; cook until eggs are set and cheeses are melted, 3 to 4 more minutes. Season with salt and pepper.

flour-halva-recipe-lezzet.name: Flour Halva Recipe

ingredients.item: Instead of S&uuml, you can prepare a more classic unhelbud using water.
You can increase the amount of the aroma for butter.
You can get a different taste using brunette sugar instead.
You can enrich the traditional flavor by adding roasted pine peanut.
u can add a different flavor by spreading on the car.
A lighter version can reduce the amount of to a bit.
You can get a more pleasant smell by adding Vanilla.
You can provide longer time based on water.

instructions: 1. First prepare for the evil.
2. Water, milk and sugar small pot and mix.
3. Take the sugar completely melted and put it on a edge when you start boiling.
4. Take butter and liquid oil to a large and thick-based pot.
5. Heat in medium fire.
6. Then add the flour and pour it into the oil by mixing.
7. Su gold of the quantum and sul roast about 25–30 minutes by mixing it.
8. The color of the Unin and the beautiful smell of roasting until you are tired.
9. carefully add the joy that you prepare for the roasting of the Kavrulan.
10. Quickly mix the lump &ouml at this stage.
11. 11. Aka&ccedil when Helva is loosened; mix more minutes, then close the golden of the stove.
12. 4–5 minutes more stirring, sit the consistency.
12. August Finally, close the cover and relax for about 15 minutes.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

fluffy-greek-yogurt-pancakes.name: Fluffy Greek Yogurt Pancakes
instructions: Mix flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder together in a large bowl. Mix yogurt, egg, water, and vanilla extract together in a small bowl. Pour yogurt mixture into flour mixture; mix until well incorporated. Add additional water by the tablespoon if needed to reach the right consistency.
Heat oil in a griddle or skillet over medium heat. Use approximately 1/4 cup of batter per pancake. Cook until golden brown, 2 to 3 minutes per side.

freekeh-paella-with-clams-and-almond-aio.name: Freekeh Paella With Clams And Almond Aioli

ingredients.item: -hot chile (such as a hungarian wax pepper)
Hot pickled peppers from a jar

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast almonds on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 5–8 minutes. Let cool.

Pulse almonds and garlic in a food processor or blender until finely ground. With motor running, gradually stream in oil, lemon juice, then ¼ cup water; process, adding water as needed, until aioli is light, smooth, and consistency of mayonnaise; season with salt. Cover; chill.
DO AHEAD: Aioli can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

Pulse onions in a food processor until finely chopped; transfer to a large bowl. Repeat, separately, with carrots, garlic, and chile, adding to bowl with onions as you go. Pulse chorizo in food processor until finely ground.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium and cook chorizo, stirring often, until crisp, about 5 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer chorizo to a plate.
Add vegetables and bay leaf to skillet; season with salt. Cook, stirring often, until moisture is evaporated and vegetables have started to brown, 12–15 minutes; this is your flavor base.

Add freekeh and cook, stirring, until lightly toasted and fragrant, about 3 minutes. Add tomato paste and cook, stirring, until darkened in color, about 2 minutes. Stir in chorizo and 4½ cups water; season with salt. Bring to a simmer, cover, and cook, adding more water if liquid evaporates too quickly, until grains are al dente and almost all liquid is absorbed, 45–50 minutes. Nestle clams in freekeh and cover skillet. Cook until clams open, 7–10 minutes; discard any that don’t open, along with bay leaf. Increase heat to medium-high and cook until clam juices evaporate and freekeh is tender, about 5 minutes.
Top with pickled peppers and parsley; serve with aioli and lemon wedges.

french-style-chicken-teleculinaria.name: French Style Chicken

ingredients.item: 1 kg  pernas e asas de frango

instructions: Tempere o frango com sal e core-o numa frigideira com azeite. Quando estiver dourado, retire para uma travessa ou prato de forno.

Elimine a gordura da frigideira, salteie nela o bacon e junte ao frango. Na mesma frigideira, refogue a cebola picada, o aipo cortado em cubos e o tomilho, por cerca de 5 a 7 minutos, sem deixar ganhar muita cor. No final, acrescente os alhos picados e deixe refogar ligeiramente.

Water with the brandy or whisky and let the alcohol evaporate while scraping the bottom of the skillet with a spoon. Add the flour and stir well to incorporate. Add the water slowly until you get a thick sauce. Then add cider and cream and mix well.
Cover the chicken and bacon with the previous preparation, cover with foil tape and put it in the oven, preheated at 180°C for 30 minutes. Eliminate the paper and let it cook for another 15 minutes.

Meanwhile, peel and peel the apples and cut them into buds. Color them in a frying pan with butter. Remove the chicken from the oven, add the coloured apples and wrap. Take it back to the oven, just for the apples to gain some color, and serve.

fresh-peach-galette.name: Fresh Peach Galette

ingredients.prep: cut into 1/4-inch slices, or more to taste

instructions: To make the dough: Combine flour and salt in a medium bowl. Pour in water slowly and mix with a bowl scraper until absorbed. Add vanilla extract. Slowly mash butter into the mixture using your fingers until well combined. Flatten dough into a saucer and wrap in plastic wrap. Refrigerate for 1 hour or up to overnight.

To make the filling: Place peaches in a medium bowl. Sprinkle with salt. Add sugar, vanilla paste, and cornstarch. Stir with a wooden spoon and let sit until peach juices are released, 5 to 10 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line baking sheets with parchment paper.

Lightly flour a work surface. Roll dough out to a thickness of no more than 1/4 inch. Cut out 8 circles of dough using the rim of a cereal bowl. Place rounds 1 inch apart on the baking sheets. Place 2 spoonfuls of the peach filling onto the center of each crust, leaving about 1/2 inch of space around the edges.
Fold in the edges of the crusts 1/4 inch toward the center of each galette, forming a short lip to keep the filling in the middle.
Bake in the preheated oven until crusts are golden brown and bottoms have been cooked through, 12 to 15 minutes.

fried-cuttlefish-argiro.name: Fried Cuttlefish
instructions: Put the cuttlefish in a colander to draw.
After the cuttlefish drag well, add them to a bowl and sprinkle with some salt. Mix.
Add the flower and mix to flower well.
Put them in a colander and shake off the exces flour.
Place a large pan over medium to high heat and add the olive oil.
Once the oil is warm, ideally at 180oC, we put the cuttlefish in.
Fry for 3-4 minutes to brightly brown.
Add the raisins, hot pepper, fresh oregano and fennel.
Add the vintage and then lower the intensity of the focus to the lower.
Leave for 2’ the pan covered in low heat, to fuck all the delicate sauce.
Serve the fried cuttlefish immediately with their kick sauce.
They are accompanied by fresh, warm bread and season salad or boated greens.

fried-eggplant-sandwiches.name: Fried Eggplant Sandwiches

ingredients.prep: trimmed and cut into scant 1/2-inch rounds

ingredients.item: One 24 oz. jar rao’s homemade tomato basil sauce

instructions:
Season eggplant slices evenly with salt and pepper. Arrange on a paper towel-lined baking sheet and let sit 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat ½-inch of oil in a large heavy-bottomed pot to 350°. Whisk eggs in a shallow bowl, place the flour in another shallow bowl, and the panko in another.
Pat eggplant dry, pressing between the paper towels to remove excess moisture. Dredge eggplant in flour, tapping off excess. Dip in eggs; coat with panko, patting to adhere.
Working in batches, carefully fry eggplant in oil, maintaining the temperature at or around 350, until the eggplant is tender and the crust is deep golden brown and crisp on all sides, about 7 minutes, turning halfway through. Transfer to a wire rack to cool, season immediately with salt and sprinkle with parmesan. Repeat with remaining eggplant.
Preheat the oven to broil with a rack in the top third. Arrange the buns cut side up on a rimmed baking sheet. Broil until golden about 3 to 4 minutes. Remove the top buns to plates.
Spoon a tablespoon of Rao’s Homemade Tomato Basil sauce over each bottom bun and stack one eggplant slice on top of the sauce. Spoon another tablespoon of sauce over each eggplant slice. Top with another eggplant slice and spoon another 2 tablespoons on top of each slice. Top with provolone cheese and broil until cheese is golden and bubbly, about 3 to 4 minutes.
Top with basil and close the sandwich. Serve with extra warm tomato basil sauce.

fried-flour-tortilla-chips.name: Fried Flour Tortilla Chips
instructions: Heat 1/2 inch of oil in a heavy 10-inch skillet over medium heat until 182°C (182 degrees C), about 8 minutes.

Lower tortilla triangles carefully into the hot oil in batches; fry, turning frequently, until golden brown, about 2 to 3 minutes. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate to drain. Repeat with remaining tortilla triangles.

fried-shrimp-tacos.name: Fried Shrimp Tacos

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste
Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place 4 chopped roma tomatoes and arbol chiles in a saucepan. Add water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium; simmer for 1 minute. Remove from heat; cool to room temperature.

Transfer cooled tomatoes and chiles to a blender or food processor. Add 1/2 of the cooking water, 1/2 chopped onion, cilantro, 1 tablespoon oregano, 1 clove minced garlic, salt, and pepper. Pulse 6 to 8 times to chop ingredients. Transfer mixture to a bowl; stir in 1/2 of the shredded cabbage. Cover and refrigerate until serving.

Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add 1/2 chopped onion; cook and stir until beginning to soften, 3 to 5 minutes. Stir in 2 cloves minced garlic and 2 diced tomatoes; cook 1 more minute. Add shrimp and 1 tablespoon oregano; cook and stir for 1 minute. Add 1/2 cup shredded cabbage, jalapeno pepper, salt, and ground black pepper. Cook and stir until shrimp turns opaque, about 3 minutes. Remove skillet from heat.
Heat oil in large saucepan to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Place 3 tablespoons of the shrimp mixture in the center of each tortilla. Fold in half. Place filled tortillas in hot oil, working in batches if needed. Fry until golden brown, about 3 minutes. Turn carefully with tongs. Brown the other side, about 3 minutes more. Transfer cooked tacos to a paper-towel-lined plate to drain.
Top with cabbage salsa and a slice of avocado.

fried-smelts.name: Fried Smelts
instructions: Pour oil into a large pot to a depth of 1/2". Attach a deep-fry thermometer to the side of the pot so the bulb is submerged in oil. Heat oil over medium-high heat to 160°C (160°C).
Season smelt fillets lightly with salt.

Place flour in a wide shallow dish (a pie dish is ideal). Holding 1 fillet by the tail, dredge in flour on both sides, shaking off any excess. Place on a large rimmed baking sheet; repeat with remaining fish.
Working in batches and returning oil to 160°C (160°C) between batches, fry fillets until light golden and just cooked through, about 1 minute per batch. Transfer fish to paper towels to drain.
Heat oil to 182°C (182°C).
Working in batches, fry fillets again until golden brown, about 1 minute per batch. Transfer to paper towels to drain. Season with salt and serve immediately with lemon wedges for squeezing over.

fried-squid-with-aioli.name: Fried Squid With Aioli

ingredients.prep: white and pale-green parts only, sliced into 3-inch pieces
sometimes sold as masarepa or harina precocida, can be found in Latin markets and some supermarkets.

instructions: Whisk potato starch, baking powder, and ¾ cup arepa flour in a large bowl. Whisk in 2⅓ cups water; let sit 30 minutes to allow flour to hydrate. Place remaining 1 cup arepa flour in a shallow bowl.

Meanwhile, whisk egg yolk, garlic, and lemon juice in a small bowl to combine. Whisking constantly, gradually drizzle in grapeseed oil and olive oil; whisk until sauce is thickened and emulsified. Season aioli with salt; stir in 1 tsp. water.
Fit a large pot with thermometer; pour in vegetable oil to come 3" up sides of pot. Heat over medium-high until thermometer registers 375°.

Meanwhile, cut squid. Slice bodies lengthwise along one side and open to expose interior. Cut in half crosswise (or in thirds if large). Cut each half (or third) into 1½" triangles; cut tentacles in half. Rinse; pat dry.

Working in batches of 5 or 6 and returning oil to 375° between batches, dredge squid, scallions, and lemon in arepa flour, shaking off excess; dip into batter, letting extra drip off. Fry, turning every 30 seconds or so, until golden, crisp, and puffed, about 2 minutes. Transfer to paper towels; season with salt. Top with basil and serve with aioli.

fried-bread-panzanella-with-ricotta-and-.name: Fried-bread Panzanella With Ricotta And Herbs
instructions: Mix ricotta and 2 Tbsp. oil in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper.

Toss tomatoes, shallot, garlic, basil, parsley, and vinegar in a medium bowl; season with salt. Heat 4 Tbsp. oil in a skillet large enough to fit bread in a single layer over medium. Fry bread until deep golden brown on one side, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board, sprinkle fried side with salt, and cut into 1½" pieces. Toss into tomato mixture.
Spread ricotta mixture over plates and top with salad; drizzle with more oil.

funeral-potatoes.name: Funeral Potatoes
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Preheat the oven to 175 degrees C (177°C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking pan.'}

{'step': '2', 'description': 'Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat; stir in onion. Saute until the onion has softened and turned translucent, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat and add bouillon granules and pepper; stir until dissolved.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Transfer to a large bowl and add potatoes, condensed soup, sour cream, and both cheeses. Stir until well combined and spread into the prepared pan.'}
{'step': '4', 'description': 'Combine cornflakes and melted butter for topping in a bowl. Stir until butter is well distributed. Sprinkle on top of potato mixture.'}
{'step': '5', 'description': 'Bake in the preheated oven until bubble, about 45 minutes.'}

fusilli-with-vegan-vodka-sauce.name: Fusilli With Vegan Vodka Sauce
instructions: Cook the fusilli according to package directions. Save 1 cup of the pasta water. Set aside and rinse the pot.
On medium heat, add the olive oil. Then, add the onion and cook until soft, stirring frequently. Add the garlic and cook until lightly browned, stirring constantly.
Continue stirring constantly and add in the tomato paste, cooking until slightly darkened and fragrant.
Add in a few tablespoons of the pasta water and stir until the mixture is slightly thinned; stir in the sugar, pepper and miso paste and turn the heat down low.

Stir in the vodka and allow most of it evaporate before adding ½ cup of the alternative milk. Stir in the nutritional yeast and chili flakes before adding more pasta water to thin the sauce as necessary.
Stir in the pasta and serve plain or with some vegan parmesan (e.g. VioLife) and more pepper!
